author: Phileeep
body:
Hmmmm….

Yes very good call with this new track Burgo!

I saw these guys at BDO GC 2008, and they were absolutely rockin! The lead singer has a level of intensity that keeps you captivated…

Prob my 3rd fav act of the day behind Rage and the Gurge (yes… i know … ) I thought the Chair sucked – perhaps not a good idea to tour straight after a split from the wife (so melincolin)

Spleep
